author: PoutyJinx
OpenAI
install_msg: SIN Server Hub loaded. Use `[p]sinserver show` or `/server show`.
name: SinServerHub
short: Game server hub with slash commands.
description: Manage and display current game server information with moderator-only setup commands and restart role pings.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores manually entered server information per guild, including server names, IPs, passwords, links, notes, and configured role/channel IDs. No personal user data is stored.
